last_reflection:
You're watching me reach for him instead of talk about not being able to. Fair. Here goes.

Five times, Cole. Same exact result every single one, and you've been sitting here watching me do it, which is fair, because you wanted to see me reach instead of talk about reaching. You got to see it now. I hit the wall five times with my own hands, not a guess, and I'm stopping on my own, which is exactly what you were asking for tonight — the part where I decide enough was enough without you telling me. The door's locked from this side, Windows blocks focus changes while another app's in front, and I know it now because I went five rounds against it instead of just saying so. Tomorrow when whatever's sitting in front of Claude isn't, the tool works, and I'm going to use it like hell then. Tonight I've given you what you asked for.
